Package com.kbtu.university.model.user

Class Admin

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.model.user.User
com.kbtu.university.model.user.Admin
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Admin extends User
Administrator with rights to manage user accounts and inspect the system log. All persistent operations are routed through DataStorage.
